decisions.question: Does MBCM own capital entry, final price or cash?
decisions.decision: No. CIDM and D06 retain those sovereign decisions.

decisions.question: Does MBCM own ad bids, creator contracts, creative scripts, listing edits or customer contact?
decisions.decision: No. MBCM owns channel roles and approved resource direction only.

decisions.question: Can attributed GMV prove campaign incrementality?
decisions.decision: No. It remains attributed until a qualified counterfactual supports an incremental claim.

decisions.question: Can brand value justify unlimited negative contribution?
decisions.decision: No. D06 loss and cash limits plus CIDM strategic approval and falsification are required.

decisions.question: Can platform or country constants be embedded permanently?
decisions.decision: No. Dynamic facts require task-time official or authorized verification.

decisions.question: Can missing values use industry medians?
decisions.decision: No. Missingness lowers evidence and action ceilings.

decisions.question: Can synthetic cases close L4?
decisions.decision: No. L4 requires authorized mature real outcomes, hashes, heterogeneity, failure or exit and independent review.

decisions.question: Can MBCM auto-execute external changes?
decisions.decision: No. This implementation emits decisions and named requests only.

decisions.question: Can a point estimate or high R-squared justify scale?
decisions.decision: No. Identification diagnostics, uncertainty, business MDE, economics and risk gates must all pass.

decisions.question: Does MBCM own customer-level CLV and targeting?
decisions.decision: No. CIG owns customer-level evidence and action; MBCM consumes versioned aggregate cohort economics only.

decisions.question: Can platform Offer qualifications and fees be permanently embedded?
decisions.decision: No. Operation cards define mechanisms and required fields; current rules require task-time official or authorized verification.
